<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="de">
<head>

  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Layout</title>

      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      box-sizing: border-box;

      background-color: #efefef;
      min-height: 100vh;
      color: #222;
    }

      background-color: #1a73e8;
      color: #ffffff;
      padding: 28px 24px;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
    }
